title: How to Reset Your CultPass Password
content:
If you have forgotten your CultPass password, follow these steps to reset it:

1. Go to the CultPass login page at https://cultpass.com/login.
2. Click 'Forgot Password?' below the login form.
3. Enter the email address associated with your CultPass account.
4. Check your inbox for a password reset email (check spam/junk if not found within 5 minutes).
5. Click the reset link in the email. The link expires after 24 hours.
6. Enter your new password. It must be at least 8 characters with one uppercase letter, one number, and one special character.
7. Confirm your new password and click 'Reset Password'.

If you do not receive the reset email, verify you are using the correct email address. Contact support if the issue persists.

title: CultPass Subscription Plans and Pricing
content:
CultPass offers three subscription tiers:

**Basic Plan - $9.99/month**
- Access to 5 cultural events per month
- Standard venue access
- Email support

**Premium Plan - $19.99/month**
- Unlimited cultural events
- Priority venue access and early booking
- Priority email and chat support
- 10% discount on merchandise

**VIP Plan - $39.99/month**
- All Premium benefits
- Exclusive VIP events and backstage access
- Dedicated account manager
- 25% discount on merchandise
- Free guest pass once per month

All plans are billed monthly. Annual billing is available at a 15% discount. Plans can be changed at any time; the new rate takes effect at the next billing cycle.

title: How to Cancel Your CultPass Subscription
content:
To cancel your CultPass subscription:

1. Log into your CultPass account at https://cultpass.com.
2. Navigate to Settings > Subscription.
3. Click 'Cancel Subscription'.
4. Select your cancellation reason (optional but appreciated).
5. Confirm the cancellation.

Important notes:
- Your access continues until the end of the current billing period.
- No partial refunds are issued for the remaining days in the billing cycle.
- You can reactivate your subscription at any time from the same page.
- If you cancel within the first 14 days of a new subscription, you are eligible for a full refund under our money-back guarantee.
- Annual subscribers who cancel mid-term receive a prorated refund for remaining full months.

title: Troubleshooting CultPass App Crashes
content:
If the CultPass mobile app is crashing or not loading properly, try these troubleshooting steps:

1. **Force close and restart the app**: Swipe the app away from your recent apps and reopen it.
2. **Check for updates**: Ensure you have the latest version installed from the App Store (iOS) or Google Play (Android). We recommend version 4.2.0 or later.
3. **Clear app cache**: Go to your device Settings > Apps > CultPass > Storage > Clear Cache.
4. **Check your internet connection**: The app requires a stable internet connection. Try switching between Wi-Fi and mobile data.
5. **Restart your device**: A full device restart can resolve many issues.
6. **Reinstall the app**: Uninstall CultPass, restart your device, then reinstall from the store. Your account data is saved on our servers.

If the issue persists after all steps, please contact support with:
- Your device model and OS version
- The app version number
- A description of when the crash occurs
- Any error messages displayed

title: CultPass Refund Policy
content:
CultPass Refund Policy:

**Event Ticket Refunds**
- Full refund if the event is cancelled by the organizer.
- Full refund if requested more than 48 hours before the event.
- 50% refund if requested 24-48 hours before the event.
- No refund within 24 hours of the event.

**Subscription Refunds**
- 14-day money-back guarantee for new subscribers.
- Annual plan cancellations: prorated refund for remaining full months.
- Monthly plan: no partial month refunds; access continues until period end.

**Processing Time**
- Refunds are processed within 5-10 business days.
- The refund appears on the original payment method.
- If the original payment method is no longer available, a credit is applied to your CultPass wallet.

To request a refund, go to Settings > Payment History > select the transaction > Request Refund, or contact our support team.

title: How to Update Your CultPass Profile Information
content:
To update your personal information on CultPass:

1. Log into your account at https://cultpass.com.
2. Click on your profile icon in the top-right corner.
3. Select 'Account Settings'.

**Name and Contact Info**
- Click 'Edit Profile' to change your name, phone number, or address.
- Changes take effect immediately.

**Email Address**
- Go to Security > Change Email.
- Enter your new email and confirm with your password.
- A verification link is sent to the new email address.
- Your old email remains active until you verify the new one.

**Payment Method**
- Go to Billing > Payment Methods.
- Click 'Add Payment Method' or edit an existing one.
- We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and PayPal.

**Notification Preferences**
- Go to Settings > Notifications.
- Toggle email, push, and SMS notifications for events, billing, and promotions.

title: CultPass Event Booking Guide
content:
How to book events with CultPass:

1. Open the CultPass app or website.
2. Browse events by category (Music, Theater, Museums, Festivals, Workshops).
3. Use filters to narrow by date, location, or price range.
4. Click on an event to see details including venue, time, and availability.
5. Click 'Book Now' or 'Reserve Spot'.
6. If your plan includes the event, it will be automatically confirmed.
7. For events outside your plan, you can pay the difference.
8. You will receive a confirmation email and a QR code ticket.

**Tips:**
- Premium and VIP members get early access to popular events (48-hour head start).
- You can add events to your calendar directly from the confirmation page.
- Group bookings (3+ people) receive a 10% discount.
- Cancellation must be done at least 48 hours before the event for a full refund.

title: Payment Failure Troubleshooting
content:
If your payment fails on CultPass, here are common causes and solutions:

**Card Declined**
- Verify your card number, expiration date, and CVV are correct.
- Check that your card has sufficient funds.
- Contact your bank to ensure they are not blocking the transaction.
- Some banks flag international transactions; CultPass processes payments from the US.

**Payment Method Expired**
- Go to Billing > Payment Methods to update your card details.
- If your card was recently replaced, update the new card information.

**Subscription Payment Failed**
- We retry failed subscription payments 3 times over 7 days.
- If all retries fail, your subscription is paused (not cancelled).
- Update your payment method and click 'Retry Payment' in Billing settings.
- Your access is restored immediately upon successful payment.

**PayPal Issues**
- Ensure your PayPal account has sufficient balance or a linked funding source.
- Re-authorize CultPass in your PayPal settings if the connection expired.

If none of these solutions work, contact support with your payment confirmation number.

title: How to Upgrade or Downgrade Your CultPass Plan
content:
Changing your CultPass subscription plan:

**Upgrading**
1. Go to Settings > Subscription.
2. Click 'Change Plan'.
3. Select your desired higher-tier plan.
4. The price difference is prorated for the current billing cycle.
5. New benefits are available immediately.

**Downgrading**
1. Go to Settings > Subscription.
2. Click 'Change Plan'.
3. Select your desired lower-tier plan.
4. The downgrade takes effect at the start of the next billing cycle.
5. You retain your current plan benefits until then.

**Important Notes:**
- Upgrading is instant; downgrading is deferred to prevent loss of paid benefits.
- If you have unused event bookings that exceed your new plan limits, they remain valid.
- VIP members downgrading will lose dedicated account manager access at the end of the cycle.
- Plan changes can be made once per billing cycle to prevent abuse.

title: CultPass Mobile App Features and Navigation
content:
CultPass mobile app features overview:

**Home Screen**
- Personalized event recommendations based on your interests and history.
- Upcoming booked events with countdown timers.
- Featured and trending events in your area.

**Discover Tab**
- Browse all available events by category.
- Interactive map showing nearby venues.
- Filter by date, genre, price, and distance.

**My Events**
- View all upcoming and past bookings.
- Access QR code tickets for entry.
- Rate and review attended events.

**Profile & Settings**
- Manage account details and payment methods.
- View subscription status and billing history.
- Set notification preferences.
- Download event history for tax or expense purposes.

**Offline Mode**
- Downloaded tickets are accessible without internet.
- Event details for booked events are cached locally.

The app supports iOS 15+ and Android 12+. Ensure your device meets these requirements for the best experience.

title: CultPass Guest Pass and Sharing Features
content:
CultPass sharing and guest pass features:

**Guest Passes (VIP Plan Only)**
- VIP subscribers receive one free guest pass per month.
- The pass grants your guest access to one event alongside you.
- To use: go to My Events > select an upcoming event > click 'Add Guest'.
- Enter your guest's name and email; they receive a separate QR code.
- Unused guest passes do not roll over to the next month.

**Refer a Friend**
- Share your referral code from Profile > Refer a Friend.
- When a friend subscribes using your code, both of you receive a $5 account credit.
- There is no limit to the number of referrals.
- Credits are applied to your next billing cycle.

**Family Plan (Coming Soon)**
- A family plan for up to 4 members is planned for Q3 2025.
- Each member gets their own profile with shared billing.
- Stay tuned for announcements in the app.

title: Troubleshooting Login Issues on CultPass
content:
If you are having trouble logging into your CultPass account:

**Incorrect Password**
- Use the 'Forgot Password?' link to reset it (see KB-001 for detailed steps).
- Passwords are case-sensitive; check your Caps Lock.

**Account Locked**
- After 5 consecutive failed login attempts, your account is locked for 30 minutes.
- Wait 30 minutes and try again, or reset your password to unlock immediately.

**Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) Issues**
- If you enabled 2FA and lost access to your authenticator app, use a backup code.
- Backup codes were provided when you set up 2FA.
- If you have no backup codes, contact support with photo ID for manual verification.

**Social Login (Google/Apple) Not Working**
- Ensure you are using the same Google/Apple account you originally signed up with.
- Try clearing your browser cookies or using an incognito window.
- If your social account email differs from your CultPass email, you may need to link them in Settings.

**Browser Compatibility**
- CultPass supports Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge (latest 2 versions).
- Disable browser extensions (especially ad blockers) that may interfere with login.

title: CultPass Data Privacy and Account Deletion
content:
CultPass data privacy and account management:

**Your Data Rights**
- CultPass complies with GDPR, CCPA, and applicable data protection regulations.
- You can request a copy of all your personal data at any time.
- Go to Settings > Privacy > Download My Data.
- Data export is prepared within 48 hours and available for download for 7 days.

**Account Deletion**
- To permanently delete your CultPass account:
  1. Go to Settings > Account > Delete Account.
  2. Confirm your identity with your password.
  3. Review the deletion summary (active subscription, credits, bookings).
  4. Click 'Permanently Delete'.
- Your account enters a 30-day grace period during which you can reactivate.
- After 30 days, all personal data is permanently and irreversibly deleted.
- Active subscriptions are cancelled and eligible refunds are processed.

**Data We Collect**
- Account info (name, email, phone)
- Payment information (tokenized, not stored in plain text)
- Event history and preferences
- App usage analytics (anonymized)

For any privacy concerns, email privacy@cultpass.com.

title: CultPass Accessibility Features
content:
CultPass is committed to accessibility for all users:

**App Accessibility**
- Full screen reader support (VoiceOver on iOS, TalkBack on Android).
- Dynamic text sizing support.
- High-contrast mode available in Settings > Accessibility.
- All images include descriptive alt text.

**Venue Accessibility**
- Events marked with a wheelchair icon indicate wheelchair-accessible venues.
- Filter events by accessibility features in the Discover tab.
- Accessibility details are listed on each event page (ramps, elevators, accessible restrooms, hearing loops).

**Requesting Accommodations**
- When booking an event, click 'Request Accommodations' to specify needs.
- Common accommodations: wheelchair space, sign language interpreter, assistive listening devices, companion seating.
- Requests should be made at least 72 hours before the event.

**Feedback**
- Report accessibility issues via Settings > Feedback > Accessibility.
- Our accessibility team reviews all reports within 2 business days.

title: CultPass Wallet and Credits System
content:
CultPass Wallet and Credits:

**How Credits Work**
- CultPass credits are a stored-value balance in your account.
- 1 credit = $1 USD.
- Credits can be used for event bookings, merchandise, and subscription payments.

**Earning Credits**
- Refer a friend: $5 credit when they subscribe.
- Event reviews: $1 credit per verified review (max 5/month).
- Promotional campaigns: occasional bonus credit offers.
- Refunds: if original payment method is unavailable, refunds go to wallet.

**Using Credits**
- Credits are automatically applied at checkout if you enable 'Use Wallet Balance' in payment settings.
- You can choose to apply partial or full wallet balance.
- Credits cannot be withdrawn as cash.

**Checking Your Balance**
- Go to Profile > Wallet to see your current balance and transaction history.
- Credits never expire as long as your account is active.
- If your account is deleted, unused credits are forfeited after the 30-day grace period.

title: Contacting CultPass Support
content:
How to reach CultPass customer support:

**Support Channels**
- **In-App Chat**: Available 24/7 via the Help icon in the app. Typical response time: under 5 minutes.
- **Email**: support@cultpass.com. Response within 24 hours (business days).
- **Phone**: 1-800-CULTPASS (1-800-285-8727). Available Mon-Fri, 9 AM - 6 PM EST.

**Support Tiers by Plan**
- Basic: Email support only.
- Premium: Email + priority chat support.
- VIP: Email + priority chat + dedicated account manager + phone support.

**What to Include in Your Request**
- Your account email or CultPass user ID.
- A clear description of the issue.
- Screenshots or error messages if applicable.
- Steps you have already tried.

**Escalation**
- If your issue is not resolved within 48 hours, reply to the support thread and request escalation.
- Escalated tickets are reviewed by a senior support specialist within 12 hours.

**Feedback and Complaints**
- Use Settings > Feedback for general suggestions.
- For formal complaints, email complaints@cultpass.com.
